summary: Refreshed .printing-press.json spec_checksum to match the current spec.yaml (sha256 384c1f5...).
reason: spec.yaml had been edited after the manifest was written, leaving a stale checksum (5e817a3...) that the publish-package provenance check would flag. spec_path 'spec.yaml' is a clean relative path (no PII; the cal-com/tmchow path described upstream was already absent), so it was kept rather than blanked.
